subject: Human Resources
title: Strategic HR Management
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Strategic HR Management.

hook.text: A company plans to double revenue in three years. Nobody asks: 'Do we have the people to make that happen?'

buildup.text: Strategic HR aligns people practices—hiring, development, retention—with the organization's business goals.

discovery.text: It shifts HR from reactive problem-solving to proactive planning: workforce forecasting and talent strategy.

twist.text: Most companies claim people are their greatest asset, yet exclude HR from strategic planning meetings.

climax.text: When HR has a seat at the strategy table, companies make better decisions about growth and change.

punchline.text: Strategy without people planning is just a wish.

quiz.question: What does strategic HR management do?
options: Aligns people practices with business goals
